description_long: This is a rectangular road sign with a bold red face bordered by a white frame, displaying the message 'ROAD AHEAD CLOSED' in large, white, capitalized letters. The sign is supported by a sturdy, metallic frame with two angled legs and a horizontal stabilizing bar at the base, ensuring stability on uneven surfaces. The frame appears to be made of painted or powder-coated metal, providing durability for outdoor use. The sign face is likely made of a weather-resistant metal or composite panel, with a reflective coating to enhance visibility in low light. There are no visible arrows or additional symbols, and the back of the sign is plain and unmarked. This type of sign is commonly used in urban environments to alert drivers and pedestrians of road closures ahead due to construction or maintenance work.
description: A red and white rectangular road sign reading 'ROAD AHEAD CLOSED', mounted on a sturdy metal frame for stability and visibility in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full red sign face with bold white text and the supporting metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled profile of the sign and the depth of the frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the supporting frame's crossbars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angled stance and the thickness of the sign panel.
